title: Design image generation product (DALL-E / Midjourney scale) + DSA review
focus: GPU capacity & queueing; cost; safety filters (NSFW/IP/deepfake).

items.label: Design an image-generation product (DALL-E/Midjourney scale)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing an image-generation product end-to-end.
How would you handle GPU capacity, queueing, and cost?

items.label: Safety: NSFW, IP, deepfakes
interviewQuestions: How would you build safety filters for an image-generation product?
How do you handle IP / artist-style mimicry concerns at scale?

items.label: Clarify requirements, users, constraints, and business metric for: Design image generation product (DALL-E / Midjourney scale)
interviewQuestions: What are the first five clarifying questions before proposing any model?
What is the business metric, what is the ML proxy metric, and where can they diverge?
What scale, latency, freshness, privacy, and reliability constraints change the architecture?

items.label: Defend data, labels, baseline, model choice, feature freshness, and serving path for: Design image generation product (DALL-E / Midjourney scale)
interviewQuestions: What baseline would you launch before a complex model, and how would you know it is insufficient?
Where do labels come from, what bias do they contain, and how delayed are they?
Which features must be computed online vs offline, and what happens when the feature store is slow?

items.label: Cover monitoring, rollback, cost, security, failure modes, and launch plan for: Design image generation product (DALL-E / Midjourney scale)
interviewQuestions: What online metrics, guardrails, and cohort slices decide whether this system is safe to ramp?
What is the rollback trigger, fallback experience, and incident owner if quality or latency regresses?
What are the top security, privacy, abuse, or cost risks, and what controls would you ship in v1?

references.label: Chip Huyen — Machine Learning Systems Design
Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer exam guide
Google ML system design mock interview — YouTube recommendations
